_note: Candidate continuation prompts (raw text, no chat template, no trailing spaces). scoring.rank_prompts scores each on fork-entropy + greedy-loopiness and keeps the top cfg.num_prompts. Deliberately mixed across 5 categories so the ranker has range: (A) open-ended/creative and (B) ambiguous mid-sentence → should score HIGH fork-entropy; (C) list/structured starts and (D) simple declaratives → loop-prone, should surface greedy degeneration; (E) sharp factual → NEGATIVE CONTROLS that should score LOW fork (if any of these rank as a fork, the scorer is miscalibrated). Add/cut freely.
